1746350.name: Waiting For The Raven - OST
1746350.description:
The soundtrack is split into 2 parts, just like in the game, one folder has more intense music in it, and the other is slightly more relaxed. Each form its own occasion.
The music was proudly made by Ben Rokah and Nativ Kalo, some of the songs are credited to one artist, some, the other.
The vision behind them was to further enhance and immerse the player with this dark and mysterious world.
